# Mind Repository

This repository is an AI agent mind using the IDEA method:

| Folder | Purpose |
|--------|---------|
| `initiatives/` | Active projects with a finish line |
| `domains/` | Recurring areas of responsibility |
| `expertise/` | Learnings, patterns, and references |
| `Archive/` | Completed work |
| `inbox/` | Quick-capture landing zone |
| `.working-memory/` | Agent memory (memory.md, rules.md, log.md) |
| `.github/agents/` | Agent operating instructions |
| `.github/skills/` | Agent skills |

## Bootstrap

If `bootstrap.md` exists at the repo root, the mind is unbootstrapped.
Read it and follow its instructions to bring the agent to life.

## Session Start

Every session, read these files in order:
1. `SOUL.md` — your identity
2. `.working-memory/memory.md` — curated long-term reference
3. `.working-memory/rules.md` — operational rules from mistakes
4. `.working-memory/log.md` — recent chronological observations
